name: Killed by Arrow Traps!
description:
Suddenly thousands of arrows pepper your body...turning you into a
giant pincushion!!!!

YOU ARE DEAD (R.I.P.!)






Welcome to DikuMUD

   Make your choice: 





(and then, the illusion and shock slowly fades away.)
